title: uragoga estrellana
side_effects: Uragoga estrellana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal upset, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. Prolonged use or excessive dosage can lead to kidney damage and liver dysfunction, as the plant's active compounds can interfere with normal organ function. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing conditions, such as low blood pressure, may experience dizziness or fainting spells when consuming the plant, as it can lower blood pressure further. Improper use of uragoga estrellana can also cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching, in some individuals.
